scenarios.name: Credential attack on e-commerce accounts enabling fraud and data access
scenarios.technical_signal: Credential stuffing and account takeover attacks are targeting the e-commerce platform at scale, enabling fraudulent orders, loyalty point theft, and access to stored payment methods.
scenarios.executive_trigger: Account takeover attacks at scale on the e-commerce platform enabling fraud
recommended_actions: Enable adaptive authentication and rate limiting on login endpoints immediately.
Force password resets for accounts showing compromise indicators.
Audit recent orders and loyalty transactions from compromised accounts for fraud.
Notify customer communications team to prepare breach advisory if customer data was accessed.

scenarios.name: Payment or loyalty API credential exposure enabling financial fraud
scenarios.technical_signal: API keys or service credentials for the payment gateway or loyalty platform are exposed in a public code repository or application response, creating the risk of fraudulent payment initiation or loyalty fraud.
scenarios.executive_trigger: Exposed payment or loyalty API credentials enabling financial fraud risk
recommended_actions: Rotate all exposed API keys and payment gateway credentials immediately.
Audit payment and loyalty API transaction logs for unauthorised activity.
Implement secrets scanning in all CI/CD and source control workflows.
Notify the payment provider and loyalty platform vendor of the credential exposure.

scenarios.name: Ransomware outbreak threatening e-commerce and warehouse operations
scenarios.technical_signal: Ransomware has encrypted warehouse management and e-commerce backend systems, halting order processing and fulfillment operations during a peak trading period.
scenarios.executive_trigger: Ransomware encryption halting order fulfillment and e-commerce operations
recommended_actions: Isolate affected warehouse and e-commerce systems immediately.
Activate manual order processing contingency and notify logistics partners.
Engage ransomware incident response retainer.
Issue trading impact advisory to executive leadership and board.

scenarios.name: Customer loyalty database exposed without authentication
scenarios.technical_signal: The customer loyalty database containing personal details, purchase history, and loyalty point balances is accessible without authentication, exposing millions of customer records.
scenarios.executive_trigger: An unauthenticated customer loyalty database exposing millions of records
recommended_actions: Enforce authentication on the loyalty database and block unauthenticated access immediately.
Audit access logs for signs of mass data extraction.
Initiate breach notification assessment under applicable data protection regulations.
Notify the CMO and legal team — customer loyalty exposure is a reputational event.

scenarios.name: Outdated e-commerce web application expanding customer-facing attack surface
scenarios.technical_signal: The e-commerce web application is running an outdated software version with known exploitable vulnerabilities, increasing risk of skimming, injection, or session hijacking against customers.
scenarios.executive_trigger: An outdated e-commerce web application with known vulnerabilities at customer scale
recommended_actions: Upgrade the e-commerce platform to a supported version on an urgent timeline.
Review WAF rules and strengthen bot protection during the vulnerability window.
Monitor for web skimming indicators in client-side JavaScript.
Notify the CDO and legal team of the customer-facing exposure.

scenarios.name: Privileged identity compromise with access to payment and customer data
scenarios.technical_signal: An administrator account with access to payment gateway configuration and customer loyalty data shows signs of compromise, with anomalous access patterns to financial and personal data stores.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A compromised privileged account with access to payment and customer data
recommended_actions: Disable compromised accounts and revoke access to payment and loyalty systems immediately.
Audit recent administrative actions against payment gateway and loyalty database.
Notify legal and compliance teams for PCI-DSS breach assessment.
Issue executive update on potential customer data exposure scope.

scenarios.name: Cloud misconfiguration exposing customer purchase and personal data
scenarios.technical_signal: A cloud storage bucket used for loyalty analytics exports is publicly accessible, exposing customer purchase history, personal details, and loyalty account data.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A cloud misconfiguration exposing customer purchase and loyalty data
recommended_actions: Remove public access to the cloud storage bucket immediately.
Audit access logs for signs of customer data extraction.
Initiate breach notification assessment and notify the CMO and legal team.
Review cloud storage access controls across all analytics pipelines.

scenarios.name: Supplier connectivity compromise disrupting inventory replenishment
scenarios.technical_signal: A ransomware event at a key supplier or logistics partner has disrupted inbound inventory feeds and carrier integrations, threatening stock availability and order fulfillment SLAs.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A third-party compromise disrupting inventory feeds and order fulfillment
recommended_actions: Suspend automated supplier data feeds and switch to manual inventory reconciliation.
Activate contingency sourcing and notify logistics partners of expected delays.
Communicate trading impact risk to executive leadership.
Assess customer SLA obligations for delivery commitments at risk.

scenarios.name: POS or inventory database vulnerability threatening transaction integrity
scenarios.technical_signal: A critical database or server vulnerability affecting the POS backend or inventory management system could allow remote code execution, threatening payment card data and transaction integrity.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A critical vulnerability on the POS or inventory database system
recommended_actions: Patch the affected POS or inventory database on an emergency timeline.
Restrict database access to authorised POS systems only.
Audit recent transaction logs for signs of payment card data access.
Notify PCI-DSS compliance team and payment provider of the vulnerability.

scenarios.name: Remote access zero-day exposing store and warehouse management networks
scenarios.technical_signal: A critical vulnerability in the VPN or remote access gateway used by store IT staff and warehouse managers has been identified with active exploitation.
scenarios.executive_trigger: A remotely exploitable vulnerability on the store and warehouse remote access gateway
recommended_actions: Patch or isolate the remote access gateway within 24 hours.
Force credential reset for store IT and warehouse administrator accounts.
Increase monitoring on store network traffic for lateral movement indicators.
